repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All five memories directly address the same ValueError raised during parse_txt_bundle when required blocks (especially python_bind_src) are missing. The current failure for ca6k_00288 shows exactly 'txt bundle missing blocks: ["python_bind_src"]', so injecting these five complementary memories will teach the agent to include the missing section rather than omit it, regardless of the operator. This is a txt-bundle generation issue, not op-specific, hence the diverse activation ops in the chosen ids still apply.
